name: DAHLIA NOIR Diode Laser
shortDescription: Premium diode laser with American COHERENT chips and 50 million shot lifespan. 4 wavelengths, 120 J/cm² energy, 13.3" touchscreen. Luxury design, without compromise.
description: The DAHLIA NOIR is a state-of-the-art, four-wavelength diode laser hair removal system that works effectively on all skin types. The combination of 755, 808, 940, and 1064 nm enables complete removal of light, dark, and hard-to-treat hair – quickly, painlessly, in a luxury design.
metaTitle: DAHLIA NOIR Diode Laser | COHERENT Chips, 50M Shots, 4 Wavelengths
metaDescription: DAHLIA NOIR premium diode laser with USA COHERENT chips. 4 wavelengths, 50M shots, 120 J/cm², 13.3" display. Luxury appearance, professional results.

videoDescription.headline: DAHLIA NOIR – Where Innovation, Efficiency, and Elegance Meet
paragraphs: The DAHLIA NOIR is a state-of-the-art, four-wavelength diode laser hair removal system that works effectively on all skin types.
American COHERENT laser chips provide up to 50 million shot lifespan, while the 13.3" large touchscreen enables comfortable operation. Luxury design, uncompromising performance.

afterVideo.text: Have questions about the DAHLIA NOIR? We're happy to help!

afterFeatures.headline: Want to see the DAHLIA NOIR in person?
afterFeatures.subtitle: Visit our showroom in Érd and try it out yourself!

final.headline: Interested in the DAHLIA NOIR diode laser?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation and we'll help you decide if this is the best choice for you.

featureRows.headline: Why choose the DAHLIA NOIR?
featureRows.subtitle: USA COHERENT chips, 50M shots, luxury design – the pinnacle of professional hair removal.

features.title: American COHERENT laser chips – 50 million shots
features.description: The DAHLIA NOIR uses American COHERENT laser chips, which represent the pinnacle of laser industry technology. The up to 50 million shot lifespan guarantees long-term, stable operation.
features.highlight: 50 million shot lifespan – up to 5-7 years of use with daily traffic.

features.title: 4 wavelengths – for every skin and hair type
features.description:
The DAHLIA NOIR operates on four wavelengths, making it safely and effectively usable on all Fitzpatrick skin types (I–VI).

Wavelengths:

755 nm – light, fine hair
808 nm – universal, gold standard
940 nm – darker skin tones
1064 nm – deep-seated hair follicles

features.title: Outstanding cooling system – multi-layer protection
features.description:
The DAHLIA NOIR features an advanced, multi-layer cooling system for painless treatments.
Semiconductor cooling
Water cooling
Air cooling
Sapphire contact surface
TEC cooling
features.highlight: Five-layer cooling system for maximum client comfort.

features.title: 13.3" large touchscreen and 12×20 mm spot size
features.description: The 13.3-inch large touchscreen provides comfortable operation, while the 12×20 mm spot size enables fast body treatments. Energy is adjustable from 0–120 J/cm², and pulse duration and frequency are freely configurable.
features.highlight: 12×20 mm spot size – fast body treatment on large areas.

features.title: Luxury design – premium appearance
features.description:
The DAHLIA NOIR is the diode laser where innovation, efficiency, and elegance meet. The premium design fits perfectly into any salon and elevates the perception of your services in the eyes of clients.

Recommended treatment areas:

Face (lip, chin, sideburns)
Underarms, intimate areas
Chest, back, arms, legs
All other body areas

training.headline: Operator training – official adult education program
training.intro: A professional operator training course is available for the DAHLIA NOIR diode laser, provided within the framework of officially registered adult education. The goal of the training is for participants to acquire comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge for the professional and safe use of the device.
items: Operating principles and safety aspects of diode laser technology
Setting DAHLIA NOIR treatment parameters by skin and hair type
Practical treatments on models – on various body areas
Contraindications, client selection, and pre-treatment protocols
closingParagraphs: You are welcome to bring a model to the training so you can learn the treatment techniques in a real-world environment.
Upon completion of the training, we issue an official FAR certificate confirming your competence in the professional operation of the device.

testimonials.name: Szűcs Nikolett
testimonials.text: The DAHLIA NOIR's gorgeous appearance and <mark>the performance of the COHERENT chips form a perfect combination</mark>. My clients love the premium feel, and the results speak for themselves.

testimonials.name: Elegance Beauty Lounge
testimonials.text: We operate a premium salon and <mark>the DAHLIA NOIR fits perfectly into our brand</mark>. The 50 million shot lifespan provides long-term security, and the cooling system is impressive.

expertQuote.quote: The DAHLIA NOIR with its USA COHERENT chips and 50 million shot lifespan is an excellent investment. The luxury design and 120 J/cm² maximum energy make it the ideal choice for premium salons.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

functionCards.name: 50M shots
functionCards.description: With American COHERENT chips, long lifespan.

functionCards.name: 120 J/cm²
functionCards.description: Outstanding energy density for effective treatments.

faq.question: What makes the DAHLIA NOIR special?
faq.answer: The DAHLIA NOIR uses American COHERENT laser chips that provide up to 50 million shot lifespan. The luxury design, five-layer cooling system, and 120 J/cm² maximum energy represent the premium category.

faq.question: What is the maximum energy density?
faq.answer: The DAHLIA NOIR operates at up to 120 J/cm² energy density, which is outstanding in the market. Pulse duration and frequency are freely adjustable according to treatment needs.

faq.question: What is the cooling system like?
faq.answer: Five-layer cooling system: semiconductor + water + air + sapphire + TEC. This combination ensures the highest level of client comfort and painless treatments.

faq.question: How quickly does it pay for itself?
faq.answer: On average within 2-4 months, with 5-8 clients per day. Use our ROI calculator for exact figures!

faq.question: What warranty do I get?
faq.answer: We provide a 2-year comprehensive warranty. We have our own service support, and we provide a replacement device during repairs.

faq.question: Can I view the device before purchasing?
faq.answer: Yes! You can view and try the DAHLIA NOIR in person at our showroom (Érd, Budai út 28.) by appointment.
